name: Deputy's Badge
description: Deputy's Badge is a unique Eridian relic from Borderlands 2. It is awarded for completing the mission Showdown in Lynchwood.
notes: Its flavour line references the chorus of Bob Marley's I Shot the Sheriff: "I shot the sheriff, but I did not shoot the deputy."

special.description: Boosts shotgun damage and reload speed. While equipped, each Deputy's Badge worn by anyone in the party adds +10% Fight For Your Life duration for all team members (stacks per equipped badge).
special.title: Who the hell shot me?
